name: Profusa, Inc.
business: Profusa is a clinical-stage digital health and medical technology company focused on developing biosensing solutions, including Lumee Oxygen for perfusion monitoring in Critical Limb Ischemia and Lumee Glucose for continuous glucose monitoring.
sellsTo: patients via direct-to-pharmacy and direct-to-hospital sales

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage digital health and medical technology company focused on developing biosensing solutions to improve health outcome for patients in a variety of different diseases and conditions.

We are a clinical-stage digital health and medical technology company focused on developing biosensing solutions to improve health outcome for patients in a variety of different diseases and conditions.
It has multiple components, one of which is a microsensor that is injected into the tissue of the patient using a hypodermic needle.

catalysts.sentence: Lumee Glucose launch is expected to occur in 2026, subject to regulatory approval.

catalysts.event: License agreement with Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2026, we entered into a know-how License Agreement (the License Agreement ) with Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research ( Mayo ), pursuant to which Mayo granted us an exclusive license to certain patent rights.

catalysts.event: Non-binding letter of intent to acquire assets from Bio Insights LLC
catalysts.sentence: On March 31, 2026 (and amended and restated on April 3, 2026), we entered into a non-binding letter of intent with Bio Insights LLC ( Bio Insights ) to acquire certain assets, including the PanOmics assay and related know-how, for aggregate consideration of $30.0 million, payable entirely through the issuance of our equity securities, including common stock and convertible preferred stock.

catalysts.event: Amendment No. 4 to PIPE Subscription Agreement allowing additional funding up to $12.2 million
catalysts.sentence: On April 2, 2026, we entered into Amendment No. 4 to our PIPE Subscription Agreement and related Pledge Agreement with Ascent.
Our hearing with the Nasdaq Hearings Panel is scheduled for April 21, 2026.
